title: pelargonium × oblatum
intro: Pelargonium × oblatum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, known for its distinctive rose-like fragrance and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can help soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to ease menstrual cramps, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × oblatum include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
